# AgentMeter

AgentMeter is an open-source, local-first dashboard for coding-agent session
usage. It indexes local JSONL session files into SQLite and shows tokens,
estimated cost, timing, sessions, projects, models, tool calls, and offline
audit findings.

GitHub: https://github.com/LyleMi/AgentMeter
Demo: https://lylemi.github.io/AgentMeter/
License: Apache-2.0

This GitHub Pages site is a static mock preview with generated demo data only.
It does not read local files, upload data, store session data, or call a
backend.

Supported source families described by the project include Codex, Claude Code,
CodeBuddy, WorkBuddy, and generic JSONL directories.
